name: Marvell Technology, Inc.
summary: Marvell Technology, Inc. is a leading fabless supplier of data infrastructure semiconductor solutions serving data center and communications end markets. The company develops custom ASICs, ethernet solutions, fibre channel adapters, processors, storage controllers, and interconnects. Leveraging System-on-a-Chip architectures integrating analog, mixed-signal, and digital signal processing, Marvell serves cloud, enterprise networking, carrier infrastructure, consumer, and automotive/industrial customers. Fiscal 2026 total net revenue was $8.19 billion, with 74% from data center and 26% from communications and other markets.

products.name: Custom ASICs
products.description: Custom semiconductor solutions tailored to individual customer specifications for data center and other applications.

products.name: Ethernet Solutions
products.description: Ethernet switching and networking semiconductor products for cloud, enterprise, and carrier markets.

products.name: Fibre Channel Adapters
products.description: Storage networking adapters for storage area network connectivity.

products.name: Storage Controllers
products.description: Semiconductor controllers for NAS, storage area networks, and general storage systems.

products.name: Processors
products.description: High-performance processors for data center and networking infrastructure applications.

products.name: Interconnects
products.description: Data center interconnect solutions for high-speed connectivity in AI and cloud environments.

products.name: UALink Switches
products.description: Ultra Accelerator Link switches under development for emerging scale-out AI networking market.

products.name: ESUN Switches
products.description: Ethernet for Scale-Up Networking switches under development for AI scale-out market.

products.name: Photonic Fabric
products.description: Photonic interconnect technology platform for next-generation AI and cloud data center scale-up interconnect, acquired via Celestial AI.

products.name: PCIe and CXL Switches
products.description: Advanced PCIe and CXL switching silicon for scale-up switching, acquired via XConn Technologies.
